input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8771 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Tests that execute real Maven goals through MavenCli may read user settings, local repository state, current working directory, and possibly networked repositories; prefer focused API/CLI tests unless deliberately isolating those effects in test code.

Existing 2.0.6 tests instantiate ArtifactResolutionException and ArtifactNotFoundException using constructor forms that differ in 2.0.7, so generated fixes must adapt to the 2.0.7 public constructors.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is needed: maven-core 2.0.7 resolves its Maven/Plexus/ClassWorlds/Wagon dependencies transitively, and the artifact contains its own META-INF/plexus component descriptors and Maven resources. The reported javac failure is an API/constructor signature drift in maven-artifact 2.0.7, not a missing dependency, Docker service, or required environment property.
